name: Actuate Therapeutics Inc. Common stock
summary: Actuate Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for the treatment of cancer. The company's lead product candidate, elraglusib, is a small molecule inhibitor of glycogen synthase kinase-3β (GSK-3β) being developed for various cancer indications. Actuate Therapeutics is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas.
